What We Offer

Insurance Products for Every Need

Comprehensive protection for you, your family, and your assets from India's top insurers

Life Insurance

Secure your family's financial future with term, whole life, and ULIP plans from India's top insurers.

  • Term & Whole Life Plans
  • Tax benefits under Sec 80C
  • Flexible premium payment
IRDAI ApprovedTax Benefits
Explore Plans

Health Insurance

Comprehensive medical coverage with cashless hospitalization at 10,000+ network hospitals.

  • Family floater & individual plans
  • Cashless hospitalization
  • Sec 80D tax benefits
10K+ HospitalsCashless
Explore Plans

Motor Insurance

Instant car & bike insurance with zero depreciation add-on and 3,000+ cashless garages.

  • Zero depreciation cover
  • Engine protection add-on
  • 24/7 roadside assistance
Instant Policy3000+ Garages
Explore Plans

Home Insurance

Protect your home and valuables from fire, natural disasters, theft and unforeseen events.

  • Building & contents cover
  • Natural disaster protection
  • Theft & burglary cover
Complete ProtectionEasy Claims
Explore Plans

Travel Insurance

Comprehensive coverage for domestic and international trips including medical emergencies and trip cancellation.

  • Global medical emergency cover
  • Trip cancellation protection
  • Baggage & passport loss
Global CoverageInstant Policy
Explore Plans

Business Insurance

Comprehensive business protection including commercial, fire, marine, cyber, and liability insurance.

  • Property & fire cover
  • Professional liability
  • Cyber security protection
Custom PlansMulti-Location
Explore Plans

Why Shikhar IMF

India's Most Trusted Insurance Partner

Industry-leading coverage with personalized service tailored for Indian families and businesses

Comprehensive Protection

Full spectrum coverage including life, health, property, and motor insurance tailored to Indian needs.

  • IRDAI approved plans
  • Tax benefits under IT Act
  • Flexible premium payment

Instant Claims

Lightning-fast claim processing with our digital-first approach. Get your money when you need it most.

  • Fast claim settlement
  • 24-48 hour processing
  • Cashless facilities

Personal Advisor

Dedicated insurance experts fluent in Hindi, English, and regional languages ready to guide you.

  • Multilingual support
  • Free consultations
  • Expert guidance

Bank-Level Security

Your data protected with 256-bit encryption and compliance with all RBI and IRDAI standards.

  • PCI-DSS certified
  • ISO 27001 compliant
  • Secure payment gateway

Customer Stories

What Our Clients Say

★★★★★

"Shikhar IMF made the entire process seamless. When I needed to file a claim for my father's treatment, they processed it within 48 hours. Truly exceptional service!"

PS
Priya SharmaHealth Insurance Client, Mumbai Verified Customer
★★★★★

"Best rates I could find for my car insurance, and the customer service is outstanding. My advisor explained everything in Hindi which helped a lot."

RK
Rajesh KumarMotor Insurance Client, Delhi Verified Customer
★★★★★

"I've been with Shikhar IMF for 5 years. Their term insurance gave me peace of mind knowing my family is financially secure. Highly recommended!"

AD
Anita DesaiLife Insurance Client, Pune Verified Customer
★★★★★

"Got my motor insurance renewed in under 2 minutes! The comparison tool helped me save ₹3,500 compared to renewing directly with my previous insurer."

VM
Vikram MehtaMotor Insurance Client, Pune Verified Customer
